column17: evidence_note

column1: # Existing rows captured before production-gate-manifest.json are explicitly marked legacy-pre-manifest.

# New passing production evidence must be emitted from production-gate summaries by production-evidence-from-gate-summary.py. That generator requires trustix-cross-host-production-gate-manifest-v1, matching production gate and verifier SHA256 values, measured 3600s coverage, run-timing forward/both coverage, bidirectional iperf interval coverage, pass result markers, matching binary identity, strong matching build identity, loaded-module and LAN state artifacts, stable boot IDs, and clean kernel log/pstore artifacts.
